{{Quote|Behold the Wasteland, where we sort the trash from the garbage and the junk. To the untrained eye, you may not notice the difference, but soon you'll have all these natural resources plentiful on Alderaan.|Wat Tambor, to Bail Organa|<ref name="Bailed Out" />}}
'''The Wasteland''' was a massive junkyard that covered a large section of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Metalorn/Legends|Metalorn]] during the final [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. It was set aside to hold the scrap and debris left over from manufacturing processes,<ref name="CSWE" /> which was sorted through by the [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]]<ref name="Bailed Out" /> so that true scrap could be incinerated while useful items were separated and reclaimed for reuse.<ref name="CSWE" />

Circa [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="Chronology note">[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 5|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume'' 5]] dates its stories, including "[[Bailed Out]]," to just before and during the events of [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].</ref> Techno Union [[Foreman/Legends|Foreman]] [[Wat Tambor/Legends|Wat Tambor]] gave [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]] of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] a [[Mission to Metalorn (Bail Organa)|tour]] of Metalorn, the highlight of which was the Wasteland.<ref name="Bailed Out" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Wasteland first appeared in "[[Bailed Out]]," a [[2006]] [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] written by [[Justin Lambros]] and featured in ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 5]]''.<ref name="Bailed Out">{{CWACite|5|Bailed Out}}</ref>
